mission.title: vitess: Delete all legacy sharding related code
mission.description: This removes all code related to [Legacy Sharding](https://vitess.io/docs/14.0/user-guides/historical/) — which began its march toward deprecation and removal in [Vitess 6.0](https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/releases/tag/v6.0.20-20200429) with the introduction of [VReplication](https://vitess.io/docs/14.0/reference/vreplication/) — the tooling and methods to shard, reshard, and diff keyspaces *before* [VReplication](https://vitess.io/docs/14.0/reference/vreplication/).

resolution.summary:
The legacy sharding code — e.g. `SplitClone` — has long since been replaced by VReplication based workflows like `MoveTables`.

This PR ensures that all related user commands are clearly marked as deprecated so that all related code can be removed in v15.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
